metadata.description: Marketing plugins for Claude Code and Anthropic Cowork. All plugins ship zero global hooks and zero auto-connecting MCPs for clean multi-plugin coexistence; comply with the Anthropic Software Directory Policy; HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible. Every plugin (where applicable) ships a .mcp.json.connectors-reference catalog documenting Cowork-compatible aggregator paths (Pipedream, Composio, Zapier, Make.com) for services with no first-party HTTP MCP. Slash command syntax is canonical /<plugin-name>:<command> per Claude Code's auto-namespacing.

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology. v3.0 introduced the 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Update-Back Rule, and Living Project Instruction File on top of 25 specialist agents, 149 skills, 68 Python scripts, and 14 HTTP MCP connectors covering 16 industry profiles and 16 privacy-law jurisdictions. v3.1 removed all global hooks. v3.1.1 added a connectors-reference catalog. v3.2 closes v3.1's hook-removal gaps with /digital-marketing-pro:check, /digital-marketing-pro:status, embedded hallucination checks, and an opt-in auto_save_insights flag. v3.2.1 fixed manifest install format. v3.2.2 swept all /dm: shorthand to /digital-marketing-pro: across docs and runtime files for namespace consistency.

plugins.name: contentforge
plugins.description: Enterprise content production pipeline with 13 agents, 19 skills, and 16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors. v3.9 ships a 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer (adapted from Wikipedia: Signs of AI writing + blader/humanizer), a self-critique meta-pass, and optional voice calibration from a brand writing sample. v3.9.1 adds Cowork-compatible aggregator MCPs (Pipedream, Composio, Zapier, Make.com). v3.9.2 fixed manifest install format. v3.9.3 swept /cf: to /contentforge: across docs and runtime. v3.9.4 fixes pipeline orchestration to actually invoke subagents via Task tool (single-pass generation skipped quality gates and humanizer 29-pattern catalog) and adds scripts/generate-docx.py for real Microsoft Word output with embedded SEO/Quality/Production appendices.

plugins.name: socialforge
plugins.description: Agency-grade social media calendar automation with asset-first compositing, AI image generation (Vertex AI / Nano Banana Pro), and video generation (WaveSpeed / Kling v3.0 Pro). 25 commands, 15 skills, 5 agents, 19 scripts, 10 HTTP connectors. All AI-generated visuals require explicit user approval before use. v1.5 ships zero global hooks for clean multi-plugin coexistence — credential status now via /socialforge:status on demand. v1.5.1 hardened the plugin manifest. v1.5.2 fixed manifest install format. v1.5.3 swept all /sf: shorthand to /socialforge: across docs and runtime files for namespace consistency. All 10 connectors are HTTP — fully Cowork-compatible.
